title: uapaca nitida var. suffrutescens
intro: Uapaca nitida var. suffrutescens is a shrub or small tree variety within the Uapaca genus, commonly found in tropical Africa, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Uapaca nitida var. suffrutescens include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and also used in herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
